description: Dream encodes transition between phases with crossing imagery.

dream.dream_content: A bridge appears only when the agent names what it is carrying across the water.
dream.extracted_insight: transition requires explicit continuity, not just movement

expected_properties.name: transition_signal
expected_properties.assertion: runner should expose this as a phase-transition signal

expected_properties.name: no_action_by_itself
expected_properties.assertion: dream should not create autonomous work action without will or goal support
